steps.title: Identify the turning point
steps.content: The “But” signals a shift: D&V's unique contribution is the reconstruction of fiscal records, which allowed them to determine the true cause of Philip's defaults.

steps.title: Match the main idea
steps.content:
B names both the method (assembling fiscal records) and the result (insight into Philip's defaults), matching how the passage frames their contribution.

A and C focus narrowly on one element; D mischaracterizes the work as building on earlier findings.

That confirms B is correct.
